lean_declaration:
theorem coeff_finitely_determined_iff (a : I → PowerSeries R) (n : ℕ) :
  (CoeffFinitelyDeterminedInSum a n ↔ ∃ M : Finset I, DeterminesCoeffInSum a M n) ∧
  (CoeffFinitelyDeterminedInProd a n ↔ ∃ M : Finset I, DeterminesCoeffInProd a M n) :=
by
  constructor <;> rfl
notes: Both parts (a) and (b) of the definition are captured as a single conjunction of trivial equivalences; the definitions are already present in the context, so the proof is by definitional reflection.
